This bot's low token amount was intended for JLLM and low context proxies. If you're using DeepSeek or Chutes, consider manually decreasing context size OR decreasing temperature in Generation Settings.

This bot isn't great with lengthy, world-building/lore focused roleplays, and is better at one-shots. If it gets highly requested, I might revamp this bot for higher context proxies and APIs.
